---
title: " Apple of Discord, The By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.” [a play]"
---

##  Apple of Discord, The By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.” [a play]

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1864
**Genre:** Fiction (historical drama)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Groombridge and Sons, 5, Paternoster Row, London.

### Notes

Magnet Stories for Summer Days and Winter Nights; 8 vols., 1860-5. Advertised as “A new story every month - Each complete in itself.”

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
